title: Farming Experience Tweaks
description: Tweaks for the Farming Experience modpack.
body:
![Farming Experience Logo](https://i.imgur.com/TmwuZvQ.png)

**This is a mod exclusively for the Farming Experience modpack**, which modifies different aspects of the base game to improve the gameplay experience. [Download Farming Experience here.](https://modrinth.com/modpack/farming-experience) ### ✨ Features - Changes the panorama background with a custom one from the modpack itself. - Changes the Java Edition subtitle to Farming Experience. - Changes the text splashes shown next to the Minecraft logo. - Adds crafting recipes for certain items. - Detects if the player is running the modpack. [![Saving for a laptop!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/491c87c96cd602ec45774ce0b0cb9fe4d25ba074.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn)
[![Patreon Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_64h.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Axperty) [![PayPal Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/paypal-singular_64h.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn) [![Ko-Fi Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/axperty)
